title: CIVITAS Public: Building a European Digital Agora — A Call to Action

creators.name: Massinger, Robert Alexander
creators.affiliation: ERDA Initiative / Independent Concept Development, Munich, Germany

description:
CIVITAS Public: Building a European Digital Agora

A Call to Action

This concept paper proposes CIVITAS Public as a concrete, actionable first step towards a European digital civic infrastructure. Situated within the ERDA (European Resilience and Democratic Architecture) framework, CIVITAS Public is conceived as a non-commercial, open-source, multilingual platform for:

  • Verified publication with accountable authorship
  • Structured democratic debate beyond algorithmic feeds
  • Transparent polling and trend observation
  • Civic questions answered by qualified experts
  • Modular expansion towards petitions, consultations, and parliamentary connectors

The paper presents the problem analysis, normative foundation, operational model, role and publication architecture, governance framework, technical design, phased roadmap (0–60 months), risk assessment, and strategic value proposition.

It concludes with an explicit call to action directed at civic-technology communities, European institutions, media organisations, academic networks, and civil society to collaborate in launching CIVITAS Public as the first building block of Europe's democratic digital future.

Core principle: Readable for all. Trustworthy through verification. Valuable through accountability.

CIVITAS Public: Aufbau einer europäischen digitalen Agora

Ein Aufruf zum Handeln

Dieses Konzeptpapier schlägt CIVITAS Public als konkreten, umsetzbaren ersten Schritt zu einer europäischen digitalen Bürgerinfrastruktur vor. CIVITAS Public ist als nicht-kommerzielle, quelloffene, mehrsprachige Plattform für verifizierte Publikation, strukturierte Debatte, Trendbeobachtung, Bürgerfragen und partizipative Erweiterung konzipiert — eingebettet in den ERDA-Rahmen.

Das Papier schließt mit einem Aufruf an Civic-Tech-Gemeinschaften, europäische Institutionen, Medien, Wissenschaft und Zivilgesellschaft, CIVITAS Public gemeinsam aufzubauen.
